name: NEXTSOURCE MAT.  DL-,001
summary: NextSource Materials Inc. is a mineral development company focused on developing the Molo graphite project in Madagascar. The project aims to produce high-quality flake graphite for use in electric vehicle batteries and other industrial applications. TICKER: NextSource Materials Inc. is a mineral development company focused on developing the Molo graphite project in Madagascar to produce high-quality flake graphite for electric vehicle batteries and other industrial applications.
